Member-only story

LLM, Agents, MCP, Context engineering, Loop engineering, subagents, Harness engineering, and Human-in-the-loop, explained through one real workflow.

11 min read
Just now

--

Every morning, before coffee, I open my inbox and brace myself.
There’s always at least one sponsorship email. Sometimes three. A brand wants to pay me to mention their product. Some of these are real.
Some are scams dressed up well enough to fool a tired brain at 7am. And even the real ones eat an hour of my day: read the pitch, research the company, decide if it’s legit, write back in a tone that sounds like me and not like a form letter.
I did this manually for a long time.
It was boring in the specific way that makes you sloppy. You start skimming. You miss the sender’s email domain not matching the brand’s real website.
You almost reply to something you shouldn’t have.
Here’s the thing I didn’t expect: fixing this one small, tedious task taught me more about how modern AI works than any glossary ever did.
